name: agentic-runner
description: Agentic Runner upper control-plane for mixed tool/skill/plugin workflows, supervised routing, handoff, audit, and Contract Coverage evidence. Fallback: leaf routes.

interface.shortDescription: Generic AGENT upper control-plane for mixed routing, handoff, resume, audit, supervised assignments, and Contract Coverage evidence.
interface.longDescription: Coordinates route state for explicit or supervised complex requests across declared tools, skills, plugins, and specialist workflows. Tracks handoff, resume, audit context, Contract Coverage for route/spec decisions and completion conditions, scoped assignments, and Write boundaries while owners produce outputs.
defaultPrompt: Use Agentic Runner as AGENT upper control-plane for complex tool/skill/plugin/workflow routing.
Track handoff, resume, audit, Contract Coverage, and supervised assignments; leave single-domain work to leaf routes.
